diagrams.title: Image Processing Pipeline in Computer Vision
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between image acquisition, image processing, and computer vision interpretation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding where image processing fits in the computer vision workflow

diagrams.title: Convolution Operation Process
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how a kernel slides across an image and computes output values
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how linear filtering through convolution works step by step

diagrams.title: Point Operator vs Neighborhood Operator
diagrams.description: Compares how point operators process pixels independently versus neighborhood operators considering adjacent pixels
elements: Point Operator (output depends only on input)
diagrams.purpose: Clarifying the fundamental difference between point and spatial filtering operations
